release_notes: **Iron butterfly, single-leg, and vertical spread structures** in the Strategy Composer: `iron_butterfly` (ATM-shorted iron condor variant), single-leg blocks (short/long call, short/long put), and credit/debit vertical spreads. **Template loader** in the Strategy Composer: a dropdown to load pre-built recipes (matching `docs/composer-strategy-examples.md`) into the working draft. Selecting one only fills the browser draft — nothing is saved or schedulable until reviewed and explicitly saved.
